questions.explanation: Speed = Distance / Time. It is the distance covered per unit time.

questions.text: The SI unit of speed is m/s.
questions.explanation: The SI unit of speed is meter per second (m/s). km/h is also commonly used.

questions.correctAnswer: A small heavy ball (bob) suspended by a light string that oscillates.
questions.explanation: A simple pendulum consists of a bob suspended from a fixed point. It oscillates to and fro.

questions.text: The time taken for one complete oscillation is called ________.
questions.explanation: Time period is the time taken by a pendulum to complete one oscillation.
